summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and reporting framework utilizing MCP handlers, heavily augmented by AI-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated test files (glm-agents) may lead to test bloat and maintenance overhead
Staged changes present during analysis indicate an unclean working state
Potential over-reliance on AI-generated tests might mask actual edge cases if prompts lack context
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant auto-generated extra tests to reduce CI execution time
Review the staged changes before proceeding with new development
Ensure AI-generated tests are validated against real-world failure scenarios, not just happy paths
